# Context (feature-name)

> **Summary:** What does this feature/module do? What are its boundaries?
> What local conventions differ from the project default?

## Dependencies

- What other modules does this depend on?
- What depends on this module?

## Local Conventions

Any conventions that are specific to this feature and differ from project defaults.

## Key Files
